subject: style(projects): add 9:16 aspect ratio to screenshot panel
body:
Sets a fixed portrait aspect ratio on the image panel so all project
cards show a consistent, meaningful portion of phone screenshots.
Prevents heavy cropping on short-description cards and ensures
uniform sizing across the grid.

Tags: projects, screenshots, styling
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: project-screenshots
Semver: patch
title: add 9:16 aspect ratio to screenshot panel
